catalog_script_client.name: Bussiness Justification

sys_update_version.name: catalog_script_client_3baa309547e54b14e9a5d369316d43b3
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>true</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>true</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>true</applies_target_record><applies_to>item</applies_to><cat_item display_value="Automated Network Request Management">195706c147610b14e9a5d369316d43a9</cat_item><cat_variable>IO:08319ec547a10b14e9a5d369316d431a</cat_variable><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Bussiness Justification</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading, isTemplate) {
   if (isLoading || newValue === '') {
      return;
   }

    if (g_form.getValue('business_justification').length < 20) {
   g_form.addErrorMessage('Minimum 20 characters required');
}
   
}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-17 04:15:52</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>3baa309547e54b14e9a5d369316d43b3</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Bussiness Justification</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Automated Network Request Management" source="x_1877518_automa_0">0ab1faa447e50714e9a5d369316d4347</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Automated Network Request Management">0ab1faa447e50714e9a5d369316d4347</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_3baa309547e54b14e9a5d369316d43b3</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-17 04:15:52</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onChange</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>true</va_supported><variable_set/><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>
